introduce.name: introduce
introduce.title: What is Nano Banana Pro
introduce.label: About
introduce.description: Nano Banana Pro is a Gemini 3 Pro-based visual model that blends text generation, image editing, and multimodal understanding. Create ecommerce hero shots, marketing posters, or storyboards directly in the browser with fast, detailed iteration.

items.title: Text/Image to Image
items.description: Transform prompts or references into 1K/2K/4K visuals, balancing realism and stylized looks.

items.title: Smart edits & repainting
items.description: Replace objects, extend scenes, remove watermarks, and refine details with semantic editing.

items.title: Consistent characters & branding
items.description: Keep people and brand elements coherent across scenes—perfect for series content and campaigns.

benefit.name: benefit
benefit.title: Why teams choose Nano Banana Pro
benefit.label: Benefits
benefit.description: Gemini 3 Pro-grade clarity, contextual reasoning, and speed help you ship visuals faster with fewer edits.

items.title: Crisp text & detail
items.description: Long paragraphs, tables, and multilingual copy stay readable—ideal for posters, packaging, and infographics.

items.title: Semantic edits that respect context
items.description: Understands prompts and references, preserving lighting, perspective, and materials when you tweak scenes.

items.title: Fast turnaround
items.description: 10–30s generations and edits, with support for consistent characters, storyboards, and batch workflows.

usage.name: usage
usage.title: How Nano Banana Pro works
usage.description: Move from idea to delivery in minutes with mixed text/image inputs and iterative editing:

items.title: Set prompts & references
items.description: Add your brief and up to 14 reference images, define style, language, and framing.

items.title: Generate in one click
items.description: Pick resolution and ratio; get the first pass in 10–30s with stable subjects and structure.

items.title: Semantic refine
items.description: Swap elements, extend canvas, or remove marks via text or local selection while keeping lighting aligned.

items.title: Export & reuse
items.description: Download 1K/2K/4K outputs, or reuse characters and styles for the next series.

feature.name: feature
feature.title: Nano Banana Pro feature set
feature.description: An end-to-end pipeline for design, marketing, ecommerce, and storytelling—generation, editing, and delivery included.

items.title: Multimodal generation (1K/2K/4K)
items.description: Turn text or images into high-res visuals across realistic, illustrative, or product styles.

items.title: Precision text & multilingual
items.description: Accurate typography for English, Chinese, Japanese, and more—even long copy stays sharp.

items.title: Reference mixing & consistency
items.description: Blend multiple references while keeping characters, branding, and materials coherent across scenes.

items.title: Semantic edits & object swap
items.description: Replace objects or adjust mood without breaking lighting, perspective, or composition.

items.title: Reusable styles & characters
items.description: Lock in roles, props, and shot language to produce storyboards or ad sets fast.

items.title: Clean exports & rights
items.description: Default watermark-free delivery, commercial-ready for print and digital.

items.title: API & workflow integration
items.description: Connect via API for batch generation, automated review, and team collaboration.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Nano Banana Pro FAQ
faq.description: Questions about Nano Banana Pro? Let us know—happy to help.

items.title: What is Nano Banana Pro?
items.description: A Gemini 3 Pro-based visual model for text/image-to-image generation, semantic editing, multilingual typography, and consistent characters or branding.

items.title: Is there a free plan?
items.description: Yes. Free trials and bonus credits are available—no credit card required to test the core features.

items.title: What can I create with it?
items.description: Ecommerce hero shots, marketing posters, brand KV, infographics, storyboards, character sheets, and product visuals from prompts plus references.

items.title: How good is the text rendering?
items.description: Gemini 3 Pro delivers high-accuracy typography: long paragraphs, multilingual copy, and small fonts stay readable for print and digital.

items.title: Does it support consistency and multiple refs?
items.description: Yes. Mix several reference images to keep characters, brands, and materials aligned across frames or scenes.

items.title: How fast are generations?
items.description: Most generations and edits finish within 10–30 seconds depending on resolution and scene complexity.

cta.name: cta
cta.title: Ready to try Nano Banana Pro?
cta.description: Start a free trial of Nano Banana Pro powered by Gemini 3 Pro, or plug the API into your workflows for automated generation and editing.
